form.confidenceQuestion: How confident are you in doing this yourself?
form.errorCostHint: What might it cost if things go wrong?
form.qualityHighWarning: High quality bar — DIY is penalized unless confidence is high.

confidence.medium: Medium — I could manage with effort

summaries.mathSaysDiyComplexitySuggestsPro: The math says DIY, but the complexity score suggests hiring a professional.
summaries.diySavesLowConfidenceHighQuality: DIY saves on paper, but low confidence and high quality needs favor a pro.
summaries.numbersAndComplexityPointPro: Both the numbers and complexity point toward hiring a professional.
summaries.numbersAndSkillSupportDiy: The numbers and your skill level support doing this yourself.
summaries.hiringSmarterChoice: Hiring a professional is the smarter financial choice.
summaries.diyViableWeighQuality: DIY is viable — weigh the quality bar before you commit.
summaries.leaningProModerateComplexity: Leaning pro — moderate complexity offsets DIY savings.

results.reclaimedByNotDoingYourself: Reclaimed by not doing this yourself
results.delegateProductivity: By delegating this, you reclaim {{hours}}. If your time is worth {{hourlyRate}}, this decision adds {{opportunityCost}} value to your personal productivity.
results.finalAdviceNote: Final advice weighs quality, confidence, and hidden DIY costs.

emptyState: Fill in the numbers and skill assessment, then evaluate your decision.
